dialog.title: Virtual Tour
dialog.message: We don't have an active virtual tour at the moment. I invite you to visit the Help Center to contact us and resolve any questions you may have about the platform.
dialog.not-available: Virtual tour is not available on this page. I invite you to visit the Help Center to contact us and resolve any questions you may have about the platform.

alert-tour.title: Welcome Tour
alert-tour.message: We invite you to take the tour to learn about the platform's features.

step1.title: Virtual Tour
step1.message: designed for delivery tracking and centralized data management.

step2.title: Welcome
step2.message1: I will guide you through the main features of the application.
step2.message2: Thank you for your time and enjoy the experience.

step3.title: Progress
step3.message1: You can close the tour at any time. Progress will be saved automatically, allowing you to resume it whenever you want.

step4.title: Notice and alert panel
step4.message: Located at the top of the screen, it appears automatically when there are active notices upon entering the application.

step5.title: Top bar
step5.message: Provides quick access to important application features.

step6.title: Tab menu
step6.message: Displays the sections for data queries offered by converge.

step7.title: Tab search bar
step7.message: Allows you to easily locate the tab you need for your management.

step8.title: Bottom bar
step8.message: Offers information about the displayed table such as the number of pages it contains or the date of its last update.

step9.title: Top menu
step9.message: Depending on the displayed table, different elements will appear that vary based on the selected tab.

step10.title: Content Table
step10.message: Main area of the application where we can view the data contained in Converge.

step11.title: Completed
step11.message2: You can retake the tour anytime by clicking on the icon

step13.title: Template Name
step13.message: Serves to identify the current template.

step14.title: Language
step14.message: Allows you to change the navigation language to Spanish, English, or Portuguese.

step15.title: Contact Us
step15.message: Direct access to our Help Center where you can contact us and stay informed about application updates.
